item.title: F-026: AI — Tone and Style Adjustment (Pro AI)
item.intent: Users need to adapt their writing tone for different audiences — Pro AI delivers quality tone shifts that exceed local model capability
item.description: Select text, adjust tone: more formal, more casual, more technical, simpler. 4 preset tone adjustments + custom instruction option. Same inline diff preview as F-025. Appears in floating action bar with Pro badge. Non-subscribers see tasteful upgrade prompt. Only selected text sent to cloud per D-AI-8.
acceptanceCriteria: Pro subscriber selects casual paragraph, taps More Formal, sees rewritten version within 3 seconds, accepts with one tap
Non-subscriber sees a non-intrusive explanation of Pro AI with subscribe option
Only selected text is sent to cloud API
Cloud API timeout after 10 seconds shows error and suggests using local AI Improve instead
Malformed API response does not crash — shows generic error and preserves original text
